<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Contracts\HttpClient\Exception; /** * When a 3xx response is returned and the "max_redirects" option has been reached. * * @author Nicolas Grekas <p@tchwork.com> */ interface RedirectionExceptionInterface extends HttpExceptionInterface { }
